title: tabernaemontana elastica
intro: Tabernaemontana elastica, also known as the flexible tree of heaven, is a plant species native to tropical Asia, belonging to the Apocynaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its seeds, which contain the alkaloids ibogaine and voacangine, exhibiting potential in treating various health conditions, including pain management, anxiety, and insomnia. The health benefits of Tabernaemontana elastica include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues. In traditional herbal medicine, the seeds are often prepared as a tincture or infusion, while the bark and roots are used to make teas or decoctions for various health benefits.
